name: Marshall Brown
abstract: Marshall Richard Brown (December 21, 1920 – December 13, 1983) was an American jazz valve trombonist and teacher.

concerts.label: Concert In Jazz: A Program of Modern American Music
Jazz: The Personal Dimension: Chicago Jazz Sextet
Jazz: The Personal Dimension: Lee Konitz-Marshall Brown Quintet

about_quotes.speaker: Tommy Newsom and Ross Tompkins
about_quotes.evidence: The transcript contains only biographical notes about Tommy Newsom and Ross Tompkins. Marshall Brown is mentioned only as a colleague of Tommy Newsom ('swing sextet with Ruby Braff and Marshall Brown'). The interviewee does not mention Marshall Brown, nor does the text describe a direct relationship
about_quotes.doc_title: Tommy Newsom and Ross Tompkins interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, September 3, 1995

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy Owens
about_quotes.evidence: I auditioned and got into the Newport Youth Band. It was run by Marshall Brown... The training and everything.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jimmy Owens interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 12, 2001

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy Owens
about_quotes.evidence: I went for an audition for the Newport Youth Band... I went in and I played with the rhythm section.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jimmy Owens — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Konitz Lee
about_quotes.evidence: The album you did for Milestone with Marshall Brown... Peace Meal. That was a nice one.
about_quotes.doc_title: Konitz Lee — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Michael Abene
about_quotes.evidence: Marshall would get those guys in to tutor the band... So basically in that band the drummer was Larry Rosen... myself... So I mean we had a hell of a band.
about_quotes.doc_title: Michael Abene interviewed by Monk Rowe, Toronto, Canada, January 11, 2003

about_quotes.speaker: John LaPorta
about_quotes.evidence: And then I got involved with that and then later on I was doing some for Marshall Brown
about_quotes.doc_title: John LaPorta interviewed by Monk Rowe, Sarasota, Florida, April 13, 1996
